title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF NAAWAN RIVER IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MANTICAO, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL, TO MANTICAO RIVER.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6299 / 53 OG No. 17, 5513 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1756, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF NAAWAN RIVER IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MANTICAO, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL, TO MANTICAO RIVER.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Naawan River in the Municipality of Manticao, Province of Misamis Oriental, is changed to Manticao River.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
